headline: What You Need to Know Ahead of McDonald's Earnings Release
summary: McDonald's will release its first-quarter earnings soon, and analysts anticipate a single-digit bottom-line growth.

raw.headline: What You Need to Know Ahead of McDonald's Earnings Release
raw.summary: McDonald's will release its first-quarter earnings soon, and analysts anticipate a single-digit bottom-line growth.

headline: Keybanc Maintains Overweight on McDonald's, Lowers Price Target to $345
summary: Keybanc  analyst Christopher Carril   maintains McDonald's (NYSE:MCD) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $354 to $345.
